name: claude-code-api
description: REST API for Claude Agent SDK

scripts.test:integration:list:
node -e "console.log('
📋 集成测试:
  npm run test:integration -- events                 - SSE 流式输出测试
  npm run test:integration -- query-stream           - LLM 流式输出测试
  npm run test:integration -- stream-authenticity    - SSE 流式输出真伪断言测试
  npm run test:integration -- conversation-memory    - 会话上下文记忆测试
  npm run test:integration -- single-query-multi-turn - 单 query 多轮对话测试

常用参数: --reporter=verbose | --reporter=dot
')"
scripts.demo:
echo '
📋 Available demos:
  npm run demo:simple-query       - Simple query demo
  npm run demo:memory            - Conversation memory demo
  npm run demo:stream           - 实时流式输出 (需先启动服务器)
  npm run demo:claude-code-intro - Claude Code introduction (1000+ words, no tools)

💡 提示: 运行 demo:stream 前，先执行: npm run start:dev'
